channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 zarazhangrui/codebase-to-course (3114 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zarazhangrui

📝 Repository: zarazhangrui/codebase-to-course

📄 Descrizione: A Claude Code skill that turns any codebase into a beautiful, interactive single-page HTML course for non-technical vibe coders.

⭐ Stelle: 3114

🍴 Forks: 300

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-22T21:25:01Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-06T04:33:11Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: Agent-A345

📝 Repository: Agent-A345/PASSforge

📄 Descrizione: A powerful and visually immersive Password Generator web app built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, designed to create highly secure passwords with entropy analysis, strength indicators, and passphrase generation.
